channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two new methods show promise for destroying forever chemicals
item.description: Scientists are testing two effective ways to break down PFAS, the persistent chemicals that accumulate in water and resist standard treatment.

item.title: Alzheimer's breakthrough: Scientists restore sleep without clearing plaques
item.description: Researchers found that brain immune cells cause sleep loss in Alzheimer's, and restored two hours of sleep in mice with amyloid plaques.

item.title: Some dinosaurs could rear up like giants until they grew too large
item.description: Two elephant-sized South American sauropods were unusually well built for standing on their hind legs. Digital tests showed that their robust femurs h...

item.title: An ordinary laptop solved a problem once thought to need a quantum computer
item.description: A quantum problem previously deemed impossible for classical computers has now been solved using relatively modest hardware. Researchers used tensor n...
